test.name: Inscription d'un Nouveau Compte

kw.name: Ouvrir Application Tutorials Ninja
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.
ce keyword permet d'ouvrir le site web Demo Tutorials Ninja

kw.name: Given Naviguer sur la page d'inscription
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Get Location
kw.doc: Returns the current browser window URL.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.
ce keyword permet de vérifier que l'utilisateur est sur la page d'inscription

kw.name: When Remplir tous les champs du formulaire
Get Time
kw.doc: Returns the given time in the requested format.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
ce keyword permet de remplir tous les champs du formulaire d'inscription

kw.name: And Cliquer sur le bouton "continuer"
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
ce keyword permet de cliquer sur le bouton "continuer" pour valider l'inscription

kw.name: Then Vérifier la création réussie du compte
Get Location
kw.doc: Returns the current browser window URL.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.
ce keyword permet de vérifier que le compte a été créé avec succès

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: ce cas de test vérifie le cas passant de la création d'un nouveau compte

test.name: Se connecter avec des identifiants valides

kw.name: Ouvrir Application Tutorials Ninja
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.
ce keyword permet d'ouvrir le site web Demo Tutorials Ninja

kw.name: Given L'utilisateur est sur la page de login
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Get Location
kw.doc: Returns the current browser window URL.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.
ce keyword permet de vérifier que l'utilisateur est sur la page de login

kw.name: When il entre un email et un password valide
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
ce keyword permet de saisir un email et un password valide pour se connecter

kw.name: And clique sur le bouton "Login"
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
ce keyword permet de cliquer sur le bouton "Login" pour se connecter

kw.name: Then l'utilisateur est bien connecté
Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Location Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL contains ``expected``.
ce keyword permet de vérifier que l'utilisateur est connecté avec succès

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: ce cas de test vérifie le cas passant de connection

test.name: Se connecter avec des identifiants invalides

kw.name: Ouvrir Application Tutorials Ninja
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.
ce keyword permet d'ouvrir le site web Demo Tutorials Ninja

kw.name: Given L'utilisateur est sur la page de login
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Get Location
kw.doc: Returns the current browser window URL.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.
ce keyword permet de vérifier que l'utilisateur est sur la page de login

kw.name: When il entre un email et un password invalide
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
ce keyword permet de saisir un email et un password invalide pour se connecter

kw.name: And clique sur le bouton "Login"
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
ce keyword permet de cliquer sur le bouton "Login" pour se connecter

kw.name: Then un message d'erreur "Warning: No match" s'affiche
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: ${message} = Warning: No match for E-Mail Address and/or Password.
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.
ce keyword permet de vérifier que le message d'erreur d'affiche lorsque les identifiants sont invalides

kw.name: And l'utilisateur n'est pas connecté
Get Location
kw.doc: Returns the current browser window URL.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.
ce keyword permet de vérifier que l'utilisateur n'est pas connecté lorsque les identifiants sont invalides

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: ce cas de test vérifie le cas négatif de connection
